title: mentha × verticillata var. montana
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. montana, also known as mountain mint or peppermint-leaved mint, is a hybrid variety of mint that is native to Europe and Asia. It is characterized by its distinctive, dark green leaves with a strong, minty fragrance and its ability to thrive in moist, well-drained soil. The medicinal properties of Mentha × verticillata var. montana include its high content of menthol and menthone, which have been traditionally used to relieve digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate nausea, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
